views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Central hub showing today's hydration progress as a prominent animated water-fill ring, current intake vs goal, quick-add buttons for common container sizes, active streak badge, and a mini hourly timeline showing when drinks were logged today

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-entry modal optimized for one-handed use: top row of preset container buttons for instant logging, drink type picker with icons, optional fields for temperature and notes, and a time picker defaulting to now

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable calendar heatmap colored by goal completion percentage (gray=0%, light blue=partial, deep blue=100%+), tappable days expanding to show individual entries with drink type icons, amounts, and timestamps, plus swipe-to-delete

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: weekly bar chart comparing daily totals with goal line overlay, drink type breakdown donut chart, hourly distribution histogram showing peak hydration times, weekly trend comparison (this week vs last), goal completion rate over 30 days, and AI-generated plain-language insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMl
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all entry amounts logged today in milliliters

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily goal achieved today (0.0 to 1.0+), used for progress ring fill

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGlassesEquivalent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's total converted to standard 250ml glasses for friendly display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries logged today, sorted by time descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayDrinkTypeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's intake grouped by drink type with ml totals, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days (ending today or yesterday) where total intake met or exceeded the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest consecutive days meeting the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyDailyTotals
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, totalMl) for the current 7-day window, used for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily intake in ml over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change of this week's average vs previous week's average; positive means improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyGoalCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of days in the last 30 days where the daily goal was met (0.0 to 1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hourlyDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 24 integers representing total ml consumed in each hour across all entries, for histogram

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakHydrationHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0-23) with the highest average intake, used for insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hydrationInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of generated insight strings based on trend analysis, streak status, goal completion patterns, and drink type diversity

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDay
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The single day with the highest total intake in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: caffeineRatio
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of today's total intake from caffeinated drinks, flagged if over 40%

dailyGoal.description: Recommended daily water intake based on general health guidelines. Default 2500ml (roughly 10 glasses of 250ml). User can customize in settings. Premium apps adjust by body weight (30-35ml per kg), activity level, and climate, but default is a sensible fixed target.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if total intake >= 100% of the daily goal. The streak is the count of consecutive qualifying days ending on today (if today qualifies) or yesterday (if today is still in progress). A missed day resets the streak to zero.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare the rolling 7-day average intake against the previous 7-day average. Calculate percentage change. Also track the 7-day goal completion count (days meeting goal out of 7) compared to the prior week. Surface the trend as 'improving', 'steady', or 'declining' with the percentage delta.
insights: Weekly trend direction with specific percentage ('You drank 12% more this week than last week')
Peak hydration hour identification ('You hydrate most around 2 PM — consider adding a morning glass')
Low intake warning if today's pace projects below 70% of goal by end of day
Caffeine ratio alert if caffeinated drinks exceed 40% of total intake
Drink diversity insight encouraging variety if >90% of entries are plain water
Weekend vs weekday comparison highlighting any pattern differences
Goal completion rate trend over the last 30 days with encouragement or nudge
